instruction: Let p be a proposition with truth value {p_str} and q be a proposition with truth value {q_str}. What is the truth value of p <-> q (p if and only if q)?
steps: The biconditional p <-> q is True when p and q have the SAME truth value.
Since p and q are {answer_truthval160} to be the same value: the result is {answer_truthval160}.
